title: IngredientLot
description: Per-lot ingredient record. Mirrors infra/supabase/schema.sql ingredient_lots, plus a computed spoilage_risk_score from services/spoilage.py.

version.description: Schema version. Bump on every change per CONTRIBUTING.md schema-freeze policy.

spoilage_risk_score.description: kg_on_hand / max(1, kg_scheduled_before_expiry). >=1.0 red, 0.7-1.0 amber, <0.7 green. Computed by services/spoilage.py; nullable until the API joins it in.

spoilage_band.description: Convenience band derived from spoilage_risk_score; lets the frontend skip the comparison logic.
